reasoning_chain_text: 2. Determine which English soldier and statesman was that mother's brother and return the full title.
original_final_question: What soldier and statesman was also a brother to James FitzJames mother? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Who was James FitzJames's mother? Evidence: James FitzJames, 1st Duke of Berwick: James FitzJames, 1st Duke of Berwick, 1st Duke of Fitz-James, 1st Duke of Liria and Jérica (21 August 1670 – 12 June 1734) was an Anglo-French military leader, illegitimate son of King James II of England by Arabella Churchill, sister of the 1st Duke of Marlborough. -> Arabella Churchill

Node 2: Which English soldier and statesman was the 1st Duke of Marlborough, Arabella Churchill's brother? Evidence: John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough: General John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough, 1st Prince of Mindelheim, 1st Count of Nellenburg, Prince of the Holy Roman Empire, ( , often ; 26 May 1650 – 16 June 1722 O.S. ) was an English soldier and statesman whose career spanned the reigns of five monarchs. -> John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough
Final answer: John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough
